what_it_does: A Supabase CLI state file holding the name of the currently selected branch. Contains the single word 'main'.
observations: Lives under supabase/.branches, a CLI-managed state directory
The sibling .gitignore in this tree ignores .branches
conventions: Standard Supabase CLI local-state file (normally gitignored)
notes: A Supabase CLI marker file recording the current branch as 'main' — generated local state, not authored content.
intention_signals: Records which Supabase branch the CLI currently targets.
contribution: Contributes the recorded current-branch pointer ('main') for the Supabase CLI workspace.
summary_for_embedding: A Supabase CLI state file containing the current branch name 'main'.
intention_for_embedding: To record the currently selected Supabase branch for the local CLI workspace.
